title: Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tripura

overview.short: Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the North Tripura district of the Indian state of Tripura.
overview.description: Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the North Tripura district of the Indian state of Tripura. It is near the urban center of Panisagar and has significant anthropogenic pressure with risk of fragmentation. Even though precipitation is fairly high, the area still falls under fire risk, and has been categorized to be highly fire prone.

topPlaces.name: Panisagar
topPlaces.description: Panisagar is a town and a Nagar panchayat in North Tripura district in the state of Tripura, India. It is also the headquarters of Panisagar Tehsil.

topPlaces.name: Dharmanagar
topPlaces.description: Dharmanagar (Bengali pronunciation: [dhormonogor]), is a town with a municipal council in the state of Tripura in northeastern part of India. It is the administrative center for North Tripura district, located in the northernmost region of the state near the Bangladesh border on the east and the India-Bangladesh border on the west.

items.note: Panisagar is a town and a Nagar panchayat in North Tripura district in the state of Tripura, India. It is also the headquarters of Panisagar Tehsil.

Dharmanagar (Bengali pronunciation: [dhormonogor]), is a town with a municipal council in the state of Tripura in northeastern part of India. It is the administrative center for North Tripura district, located in the northernmost region of the state near the Bangladesh border on the east and the India-Bangladesh border on the west.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lengpui Airport, Aizawl (68 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rowa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panisagar, Dharmanagar.
